[index-62.html](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/28024277/index-62.html)
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8" />
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
<title>The Connected Leader — Developed By Dynasty</title>
<meta name="description" content="A leadership training on social & emotional connection: building trust with your team, your family, and yourself. Do The Thing." />
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com" />
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin />
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Fraunces:ital,opsz,wght@0,9..144,300;0,9..144,400;0,9..144,500;0,9..144,600;0,9..144,700;0,9..144,900;1,9..144,300;1,9..144,400;1,9..144,500&family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet" />
<style>
  :root {
    --cream: #f4efe4;
    --cream-deep: #ebe4d4;
    --paper: #faf7ef;
    --forest: #1f3d2e;
    --forest-deep: #142519;
    --forest-soft: #2d5740;
    --amber: #c8602a;
    --amber-soft: #d97842;
    --ink: #1a1a1a;
    --ink-soft: #3a3a3a;
    --line: rgba(31, 61, 46, 0.18);
  }

  * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
  html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }

  body {
    font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
    background: var(--cream);
    color: var(--ink);
    line-height: 1.6;
    overflow-x: hidden;
    background-image:
      radial-gradient(circle at 20% 10%, rgba(200, 96, 42, 0.04) 0%, transparent 50%),
      radial-gradient(circle at 80% 90%, rgba(31, 61, 46, 0.05) 0%, transparent 50%);
  }
  body::before {
    content: '';
    position: fixed; inset: 0;
    background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='n'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.9' numOctaves='2' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3CfeColorMatrix values='0 0 0 0 0.08 0 0 0 0 0.15 0 0 0 0 0.11 0 0 0 0.05 0'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23n)'/%3E%3C/svg%3E");
    pointer-events: none; z-index: 100; opacity: 0.6;
  }

  .container { max-width: 1280px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 40px; }

  /* === Dynasty D image classes === */
  .d-mark { display: inline-block; vertical-align: middle; }
  .d-mark img { display: block; width: 100%; height: 100%; }

  /* === NAV === */
  nav {
    padding: 22px 0;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);
    position: sticky; top: 0;
    background: rgba(244, 239, 228, 0.88);
    backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
    z-index: 50;
  }
  .nav-inner {
    display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;
    font-size: 13px; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase;
  }
  .nav-brand {
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px;
    color: var(--forest);
  }
  .nav-brand-text {
    font-family: 'Fraunces', serif;
    font-weight: 400; font-style: italic;
    font-size: 17px;
    letter-spacing: 0; text-transform: none;
  }
  .nav-brand-d {
    width: 38px;
    height: 36px;
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }
  .nav-mantra {
    font-family: 'Fraunces', serif;
    font-size: 14px; font-style: italic;
    color: var(--amber);
    text-transform: none; letter-spacing: 0;
    font-weight: 400;
  }
  .nav-links { display: flex; gap: 32px; }
  .nav-links a {
    color: var(--ink-soft);
    text-decoration: none;
    transition: color 0.2s;
    font-size: 11px;
  }
  .nav-links a:hover { color: var(--amber); }

  /* === HERO === */
  .hero {
    padding: 80px 0 120px;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .hero-watermark {
    position: absolute;
    top: 50%;
    right: 60px;
    transform: translateY(-50%);
    width: 380px;
    height: 360px;
    opacity: 0.08;
    pointer-events: none;
    user-select: none;
    z-index: 0;
  }
  .hero-watermark img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: contain; }
  .hero > .container { position: relative; z-index: 1; }
  .hero-eyebrow {
    font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.25em; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--amber); font-weight: 600;
    margin-bottom: 32px;
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px;
  }
  .hero-eyebrow::before {
    content: ''; width: 40px; height: 1px; background: var(--amber);
  }
  .hero-title {
    font-family: 'Fraunces', serif;
    font-size: clamp(56px, 10vw, 144px);
    line-height: 0.95; font-weight: 400;
    color: var(--forest);
    letter-spacing: -0.03em;
    margin-bottom: 40px;
    font-variation-settings: "opsz" 144;
  }
  .hero-title em {
    font-style: italic; font-weight: 300; color: var(--amber);
  }
  .hero-meta {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 2fr 1fr;
    gap: 80px;
    align-items: end;
    margin-top: 60px;
  }
  .hero-lede {
    font-family: 'Fraunces', serif;
    font-size: 22px; line-height: 1.5;
    color: var(--ink-soft);
    font-weight: 300;
    max-width: 540px;
  }
  .hero-details {
    font-size: 13px; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--forest-soft);
    border-left: 1px solid var(--line);
    padding-left: 24px;
  }
  .hero-details div { margin-bottom: 8px; }
  .hero-details strong {
    color: var(--forest); font-weight: 600;
    display: block; margin-top: 4px;
    font-size: 15px; text-transform: none; letter-spacing: 0;
    font-family: 'Fraunces', serif; font-style: italic;
  }

  /* === MANTRA BREAK === */
  .mantra-break {
    padding: 80px 0;
    text-align: center;
    background: var(--forest-deep);
    color: var(--cream);
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .mantra-break::before,
  .mantra-break::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 50%;
    width: 80px; height: 1px;
    background: var(--amber);
    opacity: 0.6;
  }
  .mantra-break::before { left: 40px; }
  .mantra-break::after { right: 40px; }
  .mantra-text {
    font-family: 'Fraunces', serif;
    font-size: clamp(36px, 5.5vw, 64px);
    font-weight: 400;
    line-height: 1;
    color: var(--cream);
    letter-spacing: -0.02em;
    margin-bottom: 24px;
  }
  .mantra-text .period { color: var(--amber); }
  .mantra-d {
    width: clamp(80px, 12vw, 130px);
    height: clamp(76px, 11.5vw, 125px);
    display: inline-block;
  }
  .mantra-d img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: contain; }

  /* === SECTION GENERIC === */
  section { padding: 100px 0; position: relative; }
  .section-label {
    display: flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 20px;
    margin-bottom: 60px;
    font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.25em; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--amber); font-weight: 600;
  }
  .section-number {
    font-family: 'Fraunces', serif;
    font-size: 80px; font-weight: 300;
    color: var(--forest); font-style: italic;
    letter-spacing: -0.04em; line-height: 1;
  }
  .section-title {
    font-family: 'Fraunces', serif;
    font-size: clamp(40px, 5vw, 72px);
    line-height: 1.05;
    color: var(--forest);
    font-weight: 400;
    letter-spacing: -0.02em;
    margin-bottom: 40px;
    max-width: 900px;
  }
  .section-title em { font-style: italic; color: var(--amber); }

  /* === CORE MESSAGE === */
  .core-message {
    background: var(--forest);
    color: var(--cream);
    padding: 120px 0;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .core-message::before {
    content: '"';
    position: absolute;
    top: -80px; left: 40px;
    font-family: 'Fraunces', serif;
    font-size: 600px; line-height: 1;
    color: rgba(200, 96, 42, 0.12);
    font-weight: 400;
  }
  .core-message-text {
    font-family: 'Fraunces', serif;
    font-size: clamp(32px, 4.5vw, 56px);
    line-height: 1.2; font-weight: 300;
    max-width: 1000px;
    position: relative; z-index: 2;
  }
  .core-message-text em { color: var(--amber-soft); font-style: italic; }
  .core-attribution {
    margin-top: 60px;
    font-size: 13px; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--amber-soft);
    font-weight: 500;
    position: relative; z-index: 2;
  }

  /* === STATS GRID === */
  .stats-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
    gap: 0;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--line);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);
    margin-top: 40px;
  }
  .stat {
    padding: 60px 32px;
    border-right: 1px solid var(--line);
    position: relative;
  }
  .stat:last-child { border-right: none; }
  .stat-number {
    font-family: 'Fraunces', serif;
    font-size: clamp(72px, 9vw, 128px);
    line-height: 1; font-weight: 400;
    color: var(--forest);
    letter-spacing: -0.04em;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    font-variation-settings: "opsz" 144;
  }
  .stat-number .unit {
    font-size: 0.4em; color: var(--amber);
    font-style: italic; font-weight: 300; vertical-align: super;
  }
  .stat-label {
    font-family: 'Fraunces', serif;
    font-size: 20px; line-height: 1.3;
    color: var(--ink); font-weight: 400;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
  }
  .stat-source {
    font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.15em; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--forest-soft); font-weight: 500;
  }

  /* === THREE CIRCLES === */
  .circles-section { background: var(--paper); }
  .circles-intro {
    font-family: 'Fraunces', serif;
    font-size: 24px; line-height: 1.5;
    color: var(--ink-soft);
    font-weight: 300;
    max-width: 760px;
    margin-bottom: 80px;
  }
  .circles {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
    gap: 40px;
  }
  .circle-card {
    background: var(--cream);
    padding: 48px 36px;
    border-radius: 4px;
    position: relative;
    transition: transform 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1);
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .circle-card:hover { transform: translateY(-8px); }
  .circle-card::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0;
    width: 4px; height: 60px;
    background: var(--amber);
  }
  .circle-num {
    font-family: 'Fraunces', serif;
    font-size: 14px; letter-spacing: 0.3em;
    color: var(--amber); margin-bottom: 24px;
    font-weight: 500; text-transform: uppercase;
  }
  .circle-title {
    font-family: 'Fraunces', serif;
    font-size: 32px; line-height: 1.1;
    color: var(--forest);
    margin-bottom: 24px;
    font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: -0.02em;
  }
  .circle-title em { font-style: italic; color: var(--amber); }
  .circle-body {
    font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.7;
    color: var(--ink-soft);
    margin-bottom: 24px;
  }
  .circle-quote {
    font-family: 'Fraunces', serif;
    font-size: 16px; font-style: italic;
    color: var(--forest);
    padding-top: 24px;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--line);
    line-height: 1.5;
  }
  .circle-quote-author {
    display: block; margin-top: 12px;
    font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.15em; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--forest-soft);
    font-style: normal;
    font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 600;
  }

  /* === TRUST === */
  .trust-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 80px;
    align-items: start;
    margin-top: 40px;
  }
  .trust-text p {
    font-size: 17px; line-height: 1.7;
    color: var(--ink-soft);
    margin-bottom: 24px;
  }
  .trust-text p.lead {
    font-family: 'Fraunces', serif;
    font-size: 24px; line-height: 1.4;
    color: var(--forest);
    font-weight: 400;
    margin-bottom: 32px;
  }
  .trust-pillars {
    background: var(--forest);
    color: var(--cream);
    padding: 48px 40px;
    border-radius: 4px;
  }
  .trust-pillars-title {
    font-family: 'Fraunces', serif;
    font-size: 28px; margin-bottom: 32px;
    color: var(--amber-soft);
    font-style: italic; font-weight: 400;
  }
  .pillar {
    padding: 20px 0;
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(244, 239, 228, 0.15);
    display: flex; gap: 20px; align-items: flex-start;
  }
  .pillar:last-child { border-bottom: none; padding-bottom: 0; }
  .pillar:first-child { padding-top: 0; }
  .pillar-num {
    font-family: 'Fraunces', serif;
    font-size: 36px; line-height: 1;
    color: var(--amber-soft);
    font-weight: 300; font-style: italic;
    min-width: 50px;
  }
  .pillar-content h4 {
    font-family: 'Fraunces', serif;
    font-size: 22px; margin-bottom: 6px;
    font-weight: 500; color: var(--cream);
  }
  .pillar-content p {
    font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.5;
    color: rgba(244, 239, 228, 0.75);
  }

  /* === SELF-CHECK === */
  .self-check {
    background: var(--cream-deep);
    padding: 100px 0;
  }
  .self-check-intro {
    font-family: 'Fraunces', serif;
    font-size: 22px; line-height: 1.5;
    color: var(--ink-soft);
    max-width: 700px;
    margin-bottom: 60px;
    font-weight: 300;
  }
  .questions {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 24px;
  }
  .question {
    background: var(--paper);
    padding: 36px 32px;
    border-left: 3px solid var(--amber);
    font-family: 'Fraunces', serif;
    font-size: 19px; line-height: 1.5;
    color: var(--forest);
    font-style: italic; font-weight: 400;
    transition: transform 0.3s ease;
  }
  .question:hover { transform: translateX(4px); }
  .question-num {
    display: block;
    font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
    font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.2em;
    color: var(--amber);
    font-style: normal; font-weight: 600;
    margin-bottom: 12px; text-transform: uppercase;
  }

  /* === QUOTES SECTION === */
  .quotes-section {
    background: var(--forest-deep);
    color: var(--cream);
    padding: 120px 0;
  }
  .quotes-section .section-title { color: var(--cream); }
  .quotes-section .section-label { color: var(--amber-soft); }
  .quotes-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
    gap: 60px 80px;
    margin-top: 60px;
  }
  .quote-item {
    border-top: 1px solid rgba(244, 239, 228, 0.2);
    padding-top: 32px;
  }
  .quote-text {
    font-family: 'Fraunces', serif;
    font-size: 22px; line-height: 1.4;
    color: var(--cream);
    font-style: italic; font-weight: 300;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
  }
  .quote-author {
    font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--amber-soft); font-weight: 600;
  }

  /* === CLOSE === */
  .close-section {
    padding: 140px 0;
    text-align: center;
  }
  .close-eyebrow {
    font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.3em; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--amber); font-weight: 600;
    margin-bottom: 32px;
  }
  .close-statement {
    font-family: 'Fraunces', serif;
    font-size: clamp(36px, 5vw, 64px);
    line-height: 1.15;
    color: var(--forest);
    font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: -0.02em;
    max-width: 1000px;
    margin: 0 auto 60px;
  }
  .close-statement em { font-style: italic; color: var(--amber); }
  .close-commit {
    display: inline-block;
    padding: 40px 48px;
    background: var(--forest);
    color: var(--cream);
    border-radius: 4px;
    text-align: left;
    max-width: 600px;
  }
  .close-commit-title {
    font-family: 'Fraunces', serif;
    font-size: 24px; font-style: italic;
    color: var(--amber-soft);
    margin-bottom: 20px;
  }
  .close-commit-list {
    list-style: none;
    counter-reset: commit;
  }
  .close-commit-list li {
    counter-increment: commit;
    padding: 12px 0;
    font-size: 16px; line-height: 1.5;
    color: var(--cream);
    display: flex; gap: 16px;
  }
  .close-commit-list li::before {
    content: counter(commit, decimal-leading-zero);
    font-family: 'Fraunces', serif;
    color: var(--amber-soft);
    font-weight: 500;
    min-width: 30px;
  }

  /* === FINAL SEND-OFF === */
  .sendoff {
    background: var(--forest-deep);
    color: var(--cream);
    padding: 140px 0;
    text-align: center;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .sendoff::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 50%; left: 50%;
    transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
    width: 1200px; height: 1200px;
    background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(200, 96, 42, 0.08) 0%, transparent 60%);
    pointer-events: none;
  }
  .sendoff > .container { position: relative; z-index: 2; }
  .sendoff-eyebrow {
    font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.3em; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--amber-soft); font-weight: 600;
    margin-bottom: 40px;
  }
  .sendoff-mantra {
    font-family: 'Fraunces', serif;
    font-size: clamp(64px, 10vw, 144px);
    font-weight: 400;
    line-height: 0.95;
    color: var(--cream);
    letter-spacing: -0.03em;
    margin-bottom: 40px;
  }
  .sendoff-mantra .period { color: var(--amber); }
  .sendoff-d {
    width: clamp(140px, 18vw, 220px);
    height: clamp(135px, 17vw, 210px);
    display: inline-block;
    margin-bottom: 40px;
  }
  .sendoff-d img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: contain; }
  .sendoff-tag {
    font-family: 'Fraunces', serif;
    font-style: italic;
    font-size: 18px;
    color: rgba(244, 239, 228, 0.6);
    letter-spacing: 0.04em;
  }

  /* === FOOTER === */
  footer {
    padding: 50px 0 40px;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--line);
    text-align: center;
    background: var(--cream);
  }
  .footer-brand {
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 14px;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
  }
  .footer-brand-text {
    font-family: 'Fraunces', serif;
    font-style: italic;
    font-size: 22px;
    color: var(--forest);
  }
  .footer-brand-d {
    width: 44px;
    height: 42px;
  }
  .footer-brand-d img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: contain; }
  .footer-tag {
    font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.25em; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--forest-soft);
  }
  .footer-credit {
    margin-top: 18px;
    padding-top: 18px;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--line);
    font-family: 'Fraunces', serif;
    font-size: 13px;
    color: var(--forest-soft);
    font-weight: 300;
    letter-spacing: 0.02em;
  }
  .footer-credit em {
    font-style: italic;
    color: var(--amber);
    font-weight: 400;
  }

  /* === ANIMATIONS === */
  @keyframes fadeUp {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(30px); }
    to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
  }
  .hero-eyebrow, .hero-title, .hero-meta {
    animation: fadeUp 0.8s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1) backwards;
  }
  .hero-title { animation-delay: 0.1s; }
  .hero-meta { animation-delay: 0.3s; }

  @keyframes drawIn {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: scale(0.9); }
    to { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); }
  }
  .sendoff-d, .mantra-d {
    animation: drawIn 1.2s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1) backwards;
    animation-delay: 0.3s;
  }

  /* === RESPONSIVE === */
  @media (max-width: 900px) {
    .container { padding: 0 24px; }
    .hero { padding: 50px 0 80px; }
    .hero-watermark { width: 220px; height: 210px; right: 20px; top: 30px; transform: none; opacity: 0.05; }
    .hero-meta { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 32px; }
    .hero-details { border-left: none; border-top: 1px solid var(--line); padding-left: 0; padding-top: 24px; }
    .stats-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .stat { border-right: none; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line); }
    .stat:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
    .circles { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .trust-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 40px; }
    .questions { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .quotes-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 40px; }
    .nav-links { display: none; }
    .nav-mantra { display: none; }
    section { padding: 60px 0; }
    .core-message { padding: 80px 0; }
    .core-message::before { font-size: 300px; top: -40px; }
    .close-section { padding: 80px 0; }
    .sendoff { padding: 80px 0; }
    .mantra-break::before, .mantra-break::after { display: none; }
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<nav>
  <div class="container nav-inner">
    <div class="nav-brand">
      <span class="nav-brand-d d-mark"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="D" /></span>
      <span class="nav-brand-text">Developed by Dynasty</span>
    </div>
    <div class="nav-mantra">Do The Thing.</div>
    <div class="nav-links">
      <a href="#message">Message</a>
      <a href="#data">Data</a>
      <a href="#circles">Circles</a>
      <a href="#trust">Trust</a>
      <a href="#close">Action</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</nav>

<header class="hero">
  <div class="hero-watermark"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="" /></div>
  <div class="container">
    <div class="hero-eyebrow">Leadership Training &middot; Social &amp; Emotional</div>
    <h1 class="hero-title">The <em>Connected</em><br />Leader.</h1>
    <div class="hero-meta">
      <p class="hero-lede">The best leaders are the most connected ones — to their team, their family, and themselves. Connection is the multiplier on every other leadership skill you have.</p>
      <div class="hero-details">
        <div>Session</div>
        <strong>30–45 minutes</strong>
        <div style="margin-top: 20px;">Audience</div>
        <strong>Dynasty Leaders</strong>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</header>

<section class="core-message" id="message">
  <div class="container">
    <p class="core-message-text">Think of the best leader you've ever worked for. <em>Not the smartest, not the loudest</em> — the best. What made them that way? It was never about technical skill. It was always about <em>connection.</em></p>
    <div class="core-attribution">Opening Question for the Room</div>
  </div>
</section>

<section id="data">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="section-label">
      <span class="section-number">01</span>
      <span>The Data on Connection</span>
    </div>
    <h2 class="section-title">The numbers are <em>staggering.</em></h2>
    <p class="circles-intro">Gallup has studied workplace engagement for over 25 years across millions of employees. Their finding cuts through every leadership theory ever written:</p>

    <div class="stats-grid">
      <div class="stat">
        <div class="stat-number">70<span class="unit">%</span></div>
        <div class="stat-label">of the variance in team engagement comes directly from the manager.</div>
        <div class="stat-source">Gallup Research</div>
      </div>
      <div class="stat">
        <div class="stat-number">$10<span class="unit">T</span></div>
        <div class="stat-label">in lost productivity globally in 2025 from disengaged employees.</div>
        <div class="stat-source">Gallup, 2026 Global Workplace Report</div>
      </div>
      <div class="stat">
        <div class="stat-number">39<span class="unit">%</span></div>
        <div class="stat-label">of employees feel someone at work cares about them as a person. Down from 47% in 2020.</div>
        <div class="stat-source">Gallup, 2024</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- MANTRA BREAK 1 -->
<div class="mantra-break">
  <div class="mantra-text">Do The Thing<span class="period">.</span></div>
  <div class="mantra-d d-mark"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="D" /></div>
</div>

<section class="circles-section" id="circles">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="section-label">
      <span class="section-number">02</span>
      <span>Three Circles of Connection</span>
    </div>
    <h2 class="section-title">Connected leaders show up in <em>three places.</em></h2>
    <p class="circles-intro">Most leaders are strong in one. Some are strong in two. The great ones are connected in all three — and the third is where almost everyone is weakest.</p>

    <div class="circles">
      <div class="circle-card">
        <div class="circle-num">Circle 01</div>
        <h3 class="circle-title">Connected to your <em>team</em></h3>
        <p class="circle-body">This is the one most leaders focus on, but often do shallowly. They mistake <em>managing</em> people for <em>knowing</em> them. Do you know what's going on in your people's lives outside of work? Do they know you well enough to tell you when something's wrong?</p>
        <p class="circle-quote">"High engagement drops turnover by 51%, raises productivity 23%, and improves well-being by 68%."<span class="circle-quote-author">Gallup, 2024</span></p>
      </div>
      <div class="circle-card">
        <div class="circle-num">Circle 02</div>
        <h3 class="circle-title">Connected to your <em>family</em></h3>
        <p class="circle-body">A lot of leaders are heroes at work and strangers at home. They give their best energy to the team and bring leftovers home. Your family is watching how you lead — and they're the ones who'll be there long after the title is gone.</p>
        <p class="circle-quote">"Good relationships keep us happier and healthier. Period."<span class="circle-quote-author">Dr. Robert Waldinger — Harvard Study of Adult Development</span></p>
      </div>
      <div class="circle-card">
        <div class="circle-num">Circle 03</div>
        <h3 class="circle-title">Connected to <em>yourself</em></h3>
        <p class="circle-body">This is the one nobody talks about — and where most leaders are weakest. Do you know when your tank is empty? Are you honest with yourself about your motives and blind spots? You cannot pour from an empty cup. A disconnected leader becomes a reactive leader.</p>
        <p class="circle-quote">"Loneliness is as harmful as smoking 15 cigarettes a day."<span class="circle-quote-author">Dr. Robert Waldinger — Harvard</span></p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section id="trust">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="section-label">
      <span class="section-number">03</span>
      <span>Trust: How It's Actually Built</span>
    </div>
    <h2 class="section-title">Trust isn't built in <em>big moments.</em> It's built in small ones.</h2>

    <div class="trust-grid">
      <div class="trust-text">
        <p class="lead">Neuroscientist Paul Zak spent over a decade measuring trust in the brain — literally tracking the chemistry. The contrast between high-trust and low-trust companies is the hardest ROI number in leadership.</p>
        <p><strong>74% less stress. 76% more engagement. 106% more energy at work. 50% more productive. 13% fewer sick days. 40% less burnout.</strong> Same job. Same industry. Same pay. The only difference is trust.</p>
        <p>And here's the truth most leaders miss: trust isn't built by hitting the big number or winning the big deal. It's built — or broken — one small moment at a time. You said you'd follow up, and you did. You remembered their kid's name. You admitted you were wrong. You kept a confidence. You showed up when it was inconvenient.</p>
        <p>Brené Brown calls it the marble jar. You don't dump in a bunch at once. You add one marble at a time, over time. And one broken promise empties more than ten kept ones fill.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="trust-pillars">
        <div class="trust-pillars-title">The four trust-builders</div>
        <div class="pillar">
          <div class="pillar-num">01</div>
          <div class="pillar-content">
            <h4>Consistency</h4>
            <p>People trust what's predictable. If your mood or standards change daily, people manage you instead of trusting you.</p>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="pillar">
          <div class="pillar-num">02</div>
          <div class="pillar-content">
            <h4>Vulnerability</h4>
            <p>The entry fee for real connection. "I don't know" and "I was wrong" build more trust than appearing to have it all together.</p>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="pillar">
          <div class="pillar-num">03</div>
          <div class="pillar-content">
            <h4>Follow-through</h4>
            <p>Your word is your currency. Small broken promises do more damage than big ones — because they happen constantly.</p>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="pillar">
          <div class="pillar-num">04</div>
          <div class="pillar-content">
            <h4>Truth-telling with care</h4>
            <p>Truth without care is brutality. Care without truth is flattery. Real leaders give both.</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- MANTRA BREAK 2 -->
<div class="mantra-break">
  <div class="mantra-text">Do The Thing<span class="period">.</span></div>
  <div class="mantra-d d-mark"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="D" /></div>
</div>

<section class="self-check">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="section-label">
      <span class="section-number">04</span>
      <span>The Hardest Circle — Yourself</span>
    </div>
    <h2 class="section-title">Honest questions. <em>Sit with them.</em></h2>
    <p class="self-check-intro">More than a third of Americans report serious loneliness — and leaders are often the loneliest people in the room. You're "on" for everyone else, and have no one you're real with.</p>

    <div class="questions">
      <div class="question">
        <span class="question-num">Question 01</span>
        When was the last time you had a real conversation about how <em>you're</em> actually doing?
      </div>
      <div class="question">
        <span class="question-num">Question 02</span>
        Do you know what fills your tank — and are you actually doing those things?
      </div>
      <div class="question">
        <span class="question-num">Question 03</span>
        When you're stressed, who knows it? Or do you absorb it and pass it on to your team and your family?
      </div>
      <div class="question">
        <span class="question-num">Question 04</span>
        Are you the same person at work, at home, and alone? If not — why not?
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="quotes-section">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="section-label">
      <span class="section-number">05</span>
      <span>Quotes for the Road</span>
    </div>
    <h2 class="section-title">The voices behind <em>the work.</em></h2>

    <div class="quotes-grid">
      <div class="quote-item">
        <p class="quote-text">"People don't leave companies. They leave managers."</p>
        <div class="quote-author">Marcus Buckingham</div>
      </div>
      <div class="quote-item">
        <p class="quote-text">"Trust is built in very small moments."</p>
        <div class="quote-author">Brené Brown</div>
      </div>
      <div class="quote-item">
        <p class="quote-text">"There is a mathematical relationship between trust and economic performance."</p>
        <div class="quote-author">Paul Zak — Harvard Business Review</div>
      </div>
      <div class="quote-item">
        <p class="quote-text">"Vulnerability is the birthplace of innovation, creativity, and change."</p>
        <div class="quote-author">Brené Brown</div>
      </div>
      <div class="quote-item">
        <p class="quote-text">"The key to healthy aging is relationships, relationships, relationships."</p>
        <div class="quote-author">George Vaillant — Harvard</div>
      </div>
      <div class="quote-item">
        <p class="quote-text">"Good relationships keep us happier and healthier. Period."</p>
        <div class="quote-author">Dr. Robert Waldinger</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="close-section" id="close">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="close-eyebrow">The Close · One Person · One Action</div>
    <h2 class="close-statement">You can be in charge <em>without</em> leading. There's a difference. <em>Dynasty leaders connect.</em></h2>

    <div class="close-commit">
      <div class="close-commit-title">Before you leave this room</div>
      <ol class="close-commit-list">
        <li>Name <strong style="color: var(--amber-soft);">one person</strong> — at work, at home, or in your inner circle — where you need to invest this week.</li>
        <li>Name <strong style="color: var(--amber-soft);">one specific action</strong> you'll take in the next 7 days. Not "be more present." Something concrete.</li>
      </ol>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- FINAL SEND-OFF -->
<section class="sendoff">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="sendoff-eyebrow">Now Stop Thinking About It —</div>
    <div class="sendoff-mantra">Do The Thing<span class="period">.</span></div>
    <div class="sendoff-d d-mark"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="D" /></div>
    <div class="sendoff-tag">Developed by Dynasty</div>
  </div>
</section>

<footer>
  <div class="container">
    <div class="footer-brand">
      <span class="footer-brand-d d-mark"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="D" /></span>
      <span class="footer-brand-text">Developed by Dynasty</span>
    </div>
    <div class="footer-tag">The Connected Leader · Social &amp; Emotional</div>
    <div class="footer-credit">Created by <em>Taylor Burnett</em></div>
  </div>
</footer>

</body>
</html>
